title: Danny Addy
extract:
Daniel Addy (born 15 January 1991) is a Scotland international rugby league footballer who plays as a loose forward for the Dewsbury Rams in the Championship.
He has previously played for the Bradford Bulls in the Super League and the Championship, and spent time on loan from Bradford at the Dewsbury Rams in the Championship. He has also played for Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League and the second tier, and the Leigh Centurions in the Championship. Earlier in his career he played as a stand-off, scrum-half and hooker.
